display_text: Puck Aghanim's Scepter: Dream Coil now causes Puck to attack all affected enemies at 90% of its attack rate. This upgrade counters enemy disengagement mechanics by punishing movement during the coil stun, transforming Puck into a sustained damage threat during team fights.
search_text: Puck Aghanim Scepter Dream Coil attack rate anti-disengage sustained damage team fight

display_text: Puck Aghanim's Shard: Phase Shift now causes Puck to attack all enemies within its attack range each time it shifts. This upgrade counters burst damage and dive-heavy lineups by adding offensive pressure during Puck's invulnerability window, enhancing its role as an elusive magic damage dealer.
search_text: Puck Aghanim Shard Phase Shift attack burst damage counter-dive magic damage invulnerability
